1.content:
In the very near future, hate-groups have been outlawed. Technology at the same time has advanced to the perfect shrinking of biological matter. These two were awfully convenient together, anyway, though legislation passed meant that from this point in the future, all those arrested for terrorism, those who preached hate speech online, all shrunken down. At first, small prisons were constructed, but another bill passed meant that those would be unneccesary.

Instead, these shrunken individuals would be sent to random people, for them to do with as they wished.

You're one of these people. Hate speech online was an umbrella that grew larger and larger as time went on, though you were one of the first few waves shrunken after the second bill. You could've been anything. As it was, a Trump supporter, declaring the election fraudulent. This was enough to have you arrested, shrunken down, and put in packaging. At a mere inch tall, you also came with a device that could alter your size for the convenience of your new owner.

Now as the light peeked into your box, you'd see who had received you.
1.title: A beginning

info.brief_description: Fascists are shrunken, and you're one of them. You're given away to a random person.
info.description:
https://www.giantessworld.net/viewstory.php?sid=9995

Basically, it's the plot of this story. However, as an interactive, it'll serve to explore a larger amount of content, yadda yadda yadda...

Hate-groups are outlawed, and when arrested they are shrunken down. These shrunken people are separated and given away to left-wing individuals and couples. This is a second person story told from the point of view of the fascists.

Obviously, this is a giantess-central plot, there are point rewards for very good entries.
